---
pagetitle: "Games"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
toc: false
resources:
  - sigma-strike.html
  - revenge-of-the-basco.html
  - acts_of_the_continuous.html
---

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
.games-root{
  --bg:#0a0a0f;
  --bg-2:#0e0e14;
  --surface:rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  --surface-2:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  --border:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  --border-2:rgba(255,255,255,.18);
  --text:#f8fafc;
  --dim:#94a3b8;
  --dimmer:#64748b;
  --cyan:#00e5ff;
  --purple:#bf5af2;
  --green:#22ff88;
  --amber:#fbbf24;
  --pink:#ff3b7f;
  --red:#ff453a;

  position:relative;
  margin:-2rem calc(50% - 50vw) -2rem;
  min-height:100vh;
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--text);
  font-family:'Space Grotesk',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
  overflow:hidden;
  isolation:isolate;
}
.games-root *{box-sizing:border-box}

/* layered backgrounds */
.games-root .matrix{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;opacity:.11;pointer-events:none;mix-blend-mode:screen}
.games-root .mesh{
  position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 45% at 18% 20%,rgba(191,90,242,.16),transparent 65%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 40% at 85% 25%,rgba(0,229,255,.12),transparent 65%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 45% at 50% 95%,rgba(34,255,136,.08),transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 35% at 5% 80%,rgba(255,59,127,.08),transparent 60%);
}
.games-root .grid-bg{
  position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:.35;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.02) 1px,transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.02) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:56px 56px;
  mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 70% at 50% 40%,#000 40%,transparent 100%);
  -webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 70% at 50% 40%,#000 40%,transparent 100%);
}
.games-root .noise{
  position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:.04;
  background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><filter id='n'><feTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='2' stitchTiles='stitch'/></filter><rect width='100%' height='100%' filter='url(%23n)'/></svg>");
}

.games-root .container{
  position:relative;z-index:2;
  max-width:1220px;margin:0 auto;
  padding:5rem 1.5rem 5rem;
}

/* HERO */
.games-root .hero{text-align:center;margin-bottom:6rem;position:relative}
.games-root .hero-crumb{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.3em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--cyan);opacity:.75;margin-bottom:1.8rem;
}
.games-root .hero-crumb .dot{color:var(--green);animation:pulse 1.8s infinite}
.games-root .hero-title{
  font-family:'Space Grotesk','JetBrains Mono',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(2.8rem,9vw,6rem);
  font-weight:700;line-height:.95;letter-spacing:-.04em;
  margin:0 0 1.5rem;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff 0%,#a5b4fc 40%,#bf5af2 75%,#00e5ff 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent;
  text-shadow:0 0 80px rgba(191,90,242,.15);
}
.games-root .hero-title em{font-style:normal;display:inline-block}
.games-root .hero-sub{
  font-size:clamp(1.15rem,2.2vw,1.5rem);
  color:var(--text);font-weight:400;
  max-width:720px;margin:0 auto 1rem;line-height:1.45;
  opacity:.92;
}
.games-root .hero-disc{
  font-size:.95rem;color:var(--dim);
  max-width:620px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.6;
  font-style:italic;opacity:.85;
}

/* SECTION */
.games-root .section{margin-bottom:5rem;position:relative}
.games-root .section-head{
  display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:1rem;
  margin-bottom:2.2rem;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
}
.games-root .section-num{
  font-size:.7rem;color:var(--dimmer);letter-spacing:.2em;
  text-transform:uppercase;flex-shrink:0;
}
.games-root .section-title{
  font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(1.4rem,3vw,1.9rem);
  font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--text);
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.games-root .section-title .arrow{margin-right:.5rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
.games-root .section.edu .section-title .arrow{color:var(--purple)}
.games-root .section.arcade .section-title .arrow{color:var(--cyan)}
.games-root .section-rule{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--border),transparent);align-self:center}
.games-root .section-tag{
  font-size:.65rem;color:var(--dim);
  letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;flex-shrink:0;
}

/* GRID */
.games-root .grid{display:grid;gap:1.5rem}
.games-root .grid-1{grid-template-columns:1fr}
.games-root .grid-auto{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(340px,1fr))}

/* CARD */
.games-root .card{
  position:relative;
  background:var(--surface);
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:20px;
  overflow:hidden;
  backdrop-filter:blur(24px) saturate(180%);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(24px) saturate(180%);
  transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),border-color .3s,background .3s,box-shadow .3s;
  will-change:transform;
}
.games-root .card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:20px;pointer-events:none;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.06),transparent 40%);
  opacity:.7;
}
.games-root .card:hover{
  transform:translateY(-6px);
  border-color:var(--border-2);
  background:var(--surface-2);
}
.games-root .card.edu:hover{
  box-shadow:0 20px 60px -10px rgba(0,0,0,.4),
             0 0 80px -10px rgba(191,90,242,.25),
             inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(191,90,242,.2);
}
.games-root .card.arcade:hover{
  box-shadow:0 20px 60px -10px rgba(0,0,0,.4),
             0 0 80px -10px rgba(0,229,255,.2),
             inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,229,255,.18);
}

/* FEATURED (Acts of the Continuous) */
.games-root .card.featured{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1fr);
  min-height:440px;
}
.games-root .card.featured .preview{min-height:440px;border-right:1px solid var(--border)}
.games-root .card.featured .info{padding:2rem 2rem 2rem}
@media(max-width:820px){
  .games-root .card.featured{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .games-root .card.featured .preview{min-height:320px;border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .games-root .card.featured .info{padding:1.5rem}
}

/* PREVIEW IFRAME */
.games-root .preview{
  position:relative;width:100%;height:260px;overflow:hidden;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#000,#0a0a0f);
}
.games-root .preview iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:none;display:block;background:#fff}
.games-root .preview .live{
  position:absolute;top:.7rem;right:.7rem;
  padding:.25rem .55rem;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.65);
  backdrop-filter:blur(8px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  border:1px solid rgba(34,255,136,.3);
  border-radius:6px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.15em;
  color:var(--green);pointer-events:none;
  z-index:2;
}
.games-root .preview .live::before{content:'● ';animation:pulse 2s infinite}
.games-root .preview .scrim{
  position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 70%,rgba(10,10,15,.15));
  z-index:1;
}

/* INFO */
.games-root .info{padding:1.5rem}
.games-root .info .term-ln{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.7rem;color:var(--dim);
  margin-bottom:.7rem;letter-spacing:.02em;
}
.games-root .info .term-ln .prompt{color:var(--green);margin-right:.4rem}
.games-root .info h2{
  font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
  font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--text);margin:0 0 .5rem;
  letter-spacing:-.02em;line-height:1.15;
}
.games-root .card.featured .info h2{font-size:1.75rem}
.games-root .info p{
  font-size:.92rem;color:var(--dim);
  line-height:1.65;margin:0 0 1.1rem;
}

/* TAGS */
.games-root .tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.games-root .tag{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.62rem;padding:.25rem .6rem;
  border-radius:99px;letter-spacing:.08em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  color:var(--dim);
}
.games-root .tag.cyan{color:var(--cyan);border-color:rgba(0,229,255,.3);background:rgba(0,229,255,.08)}
.games-root .tag.purple{color:var(--purple);border-color:rgba(191,90,242,.3);background:rgba(191,90,242,.08)}
.games-root .tag.green{color:var(--green);border-color:rgba(34,255,136,.3);background:rgba(34,255,136,.08)}
.games-root .tag.amber{color:var(--amber);border-color:rgba(251,191,36,.3);background:rgba(251,191,36,.08)}
.games-root .tag.pink{color:var(--pink);border-color:rgba(255,59,127,.3);background:rgba(255,59,127,.08)}
.games-root .tag.red{color:var(--red);border-color:rgba(255,69,58,.3);background:rgba(255,69,58,.08)}

/* ACTIONS */
.games-root .actions{display:flex;gap:.7rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.games-root .btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;
  padding:.65rem 1.15rem;border-radius:10px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.76rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;
  text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;
  border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.games-root .btn.primary{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--purple),var(--cyan));
  color:#fff;
  box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(191,90,242,.25);
}
.games-root .btn.primary:hover{
  transform:translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow:0 6px 28px rgba(191,90,242,.4);
}
.games-root .btn.cyan{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--cyan),var(--green));
  color:#001820;
  box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,229,255,.2);
}
.games-root .btn.cyan:hover{
  transform:translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow:0 6px 28px rgba(0,229,255,.35);
}
.games-root .meta{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.68rem;color:var(--dimmer);
  letter-spacing:.05em;
}

/* FOOTER */
.games-root .footer{
  text-align:center;margin-top:5rem;padding-top:2.5rem;
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.75rem;color:var(--dimmer);letter-spacing:.08em;
}
.games-root .footer .caret{
  display:inline-block;width:.5em;height:1em;
  background:var(--green);vertical-align:text-bottom;
  animation:blink 1.1s infinite;margin-left:.1em;
}

/* ANIMATIONS */
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}
@keyframes blink{0%,49%{opacity:1}50%,100%{opacity:0}}
@keyframes fade-up{
  from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px)}
  to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
}
.games-root .hero,.games-root .section{animation:fade-up .7s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1) both}
.games-root .section.edu{animation-delay:.1s}
.games-root .section.arcade{animation-delay:.2s}

/* mobile tweaks */
@media(max-width:600px){
  .games-root .container{padding:3rem 1rem 3rem}
  .games-root .hero{margin-bottom:4rem}
  .games-root .section{margin-bottom:3.5rem}
  .games-root .section-head{flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem}
  .games-root .section-tag{display:none}
  .games-root .info{padding:1.25rem}
  .games-root .card.featured .info h2{font-size:1.4rem}
}

/* reduce motion */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  .games-root *{animation:none !important;transition:none !important}
  .games-root .preview .live::before{animation:none}
}
</style>

<div class="games-root">
  <canvas class="matrix" id="gamesMatrix"></canvas>
  <div class="mesh"></div>
  <div class="grid-bg"></div>
  <div class="noise"></div>

  <div class="container">
    <!-- HERO -->
    <div class="hero">
      <div class="hero-crumb"><span class="dot">◆</span> yatawara.com / games</div>
      <h1 class="hero-title">Games by<br><em>Anjana Yatawara</em></h1>
      <p class="hero-sub">Built for fun. Play in browser. Just have fun.</p>
      <p class="hero-disc">I bear no responsibility for lost hours, lost sleep, or any exam grades that may or may not be affected. Proceed at your own risk.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- EDUCATIONAL -->
    <div class="section edu">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div class="section-title"><span class="arrow">▸</span>EDUCATIONAL</div>
        <div class="section-rule"></div>
        <div class="section-tag">01 // study_mode</div>
      </div>

      <div class="grid grid-1">
        <div class="card edu featured">
          <div class="preview">
            <iframe src="acts_of_the_continuous.html" allowfullscreen loading="lazy" title="Acts of the Continuous"></iframe>
            <div class="scrim"></div>
            <div class="live">LIVE</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info">
            <div class="term-ln"><span class="prompt">$</span>math_3200 --exam 2 --mode study</div>
            <h2>Acts of the Continuous</h2>
            <p>A six-act study game for <strong style="color:var(--text)">MATH 3200 Exam 2</strong>. Continuous distributions, MGFs, bivariate analysis. Read the density, trust the integral, know the distribution. Adaptive 138-question pool, global leaderboard, and a Grandmaster of the Continuum title waiting at 90%+.</p>
            <div class="tags">
              <span class="tag purple">Study</span>
              <span class="tag purple">Probability</span>
              <span class="tag green">Leaderboard</span>
              <span class="tag amber">No Calculator</span>
            </div>
            <div class="actions">
              <a href="acts_of_the_continuous.html" target="_blank" class="btn primary">▶ Play Fullscreen</a>
              <span class="meta">138 questions · 6 acts · adaptive</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ARCADE -->
    <div class="section arcade">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div class="section-title"><span class="arrow">▸</span>FOR FUN</div>
        <div class="section-rule"></div>
        <div class="section-tag">02 // arcade</div>
      </div>

      <div class="grid grid-auto">
        <div class="card arcade">
          <div class="preview">
            <iframe src="revenge-of-the-basco.html" allowfullscreen loading="lazy" title="Revenge of the Basco"></iframe>
            <div class="scrim"></div>
            <div class="live">LIVE</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info">
            <div class="term-ln"><span class="prompt">$</span>./chaos.exe --enable-hellfire</div>
            <h2>Revenge of the Basco</h2>
            <p>Tabasco chooses violence. Tap to fly through hellfire columns. Survive the chaos. Beat the bosses. Don't blink.</p>
            <div class="tags">
              <span class="tag pink">Fire</span>
              <span class="tag amber">One-Tap</span>
              <span class="tag red">Boss Fights</span>
            </div>
            <div class="actions">
              <a href="revenge-of-the-basco.html" target="_blank" class="btn cyan">▶ Play Fullscreen</a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="card arcade">
          <div class="preview">
            <iframe src="sigma-strike.html" allowfullscreen loading="lazy" title="Sigma Strike"></iframe>
            <div class="scrim"></div>
            <div class="live">LIVE</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info">
            <div class="term-ln"><span class="prompt">$</span>./defend.exe --target distribution</div>
            <h2>Sigma Strike</h2>
            <p>Defend the distribution from rogue outliers. Chain kills for combos, collect power-ups, battle bosses every 10 waves.</p>
            <div class="tags">
              <span class="tag cyan">Space</span>
              <span class="tag amber">Shooter</span>
              <span class="tag green">Stats</span>
            </div>
            <div class="actions">
              <a href="sigma-strike.html" target="_blank" class="btn cyan">▶ Play Fullscreen</a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FOOTER -->
    <div class="footer">
      <span style="color:var(--green)">$</span> more_games.loading<span class="caret"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function(){
  var c = document.getElementById('gamesMatrix');
  if(!c) return;
  var ctx = c.getContext('2d');
  var chars = 'アイウエオカキクケコサシスセソ01αβγδεθμσΣΦΩ∫∂∇'.split('');
  var fontSize = 14;
  var cols, drops;

  function setup(){
    var parent = c.parentElement;
    c.width = parent.offsetWidth;
    c.height = Math.max(parent.offsetHeight, window.innerHeight);
    cols = Math.floor(c.width / fontSize);
    drops = [];
    for(var i=0;i<cols;i++) drops[i] = Math.random() * -50;
  }

  function draw(){
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10,10,15,.06)';
    ctx.fillRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
    ctx.font = fontSize + "px 'JetBrains Mono', monospace";
    for(var i=0;i<drops.length;i++){
      var char = chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)];
      var x = i * fontSize;
      var y = drops[i] * fontSize;
      // head of trail is brighter
      ctx.fillStyle = Math.random() < 0.04 ? 'rgba(34,255,136,.9)' : 'rgba(34,255,136,.55)';
      ctx.fillText(char, x, y);
      if(y > c.height && Math.random() > .97) drops[i] = 0;
      drops[i]++;
    }
  }

  setup();
  window.addEventListener('resize', setup);
  // observe layout changes for iframe loads
  if(window.ResizeObserver){
    var ro = new ResizeObserver(setup);
    ro.observe(c.parentElement);
  }
  setInterval(draw, 58);
})();
</script>
```
